logoMark.concept: Lightning bolt representing AI speed and power

coverSpec.title: 500 ChatGPT Prompts
coverSpec.subtitle: FOR ENTREPRENEURS
coverSpec.tagline: Ready-to-Use AI Prompts for Every Business Situation
coverSpec.icon: 💡 lightbulb emoji, large and centered above title, or a stylized rocket SVG
elements: Large '500' numeral in #F59E0B at 240pt — most dominant element on page
Main title 'ChatGPT Prompts' in white Montserrat Bold at 72pt, 2 lines max
Subtitle 'FOR ENTREPRENEURS' in #F59E0B letter-spaced at 28pt
Horizontal gold divider line (3px, 600px wide) between icon and title
Rounded badge top-right corner: 'INSTANT DOWNLOAD' in dark text on gold pill
Bottom bar (full width, 80px high): dark #111827 background with 'AI Tools Hub' in #F59E0B 18pt left-aligned
Tagline text below subtitle in light gray #9CA3AF at 22pt
coverSpec.canvaInstructions: 1. Open Canva, create new design 2000x2000px. 2. Fill background with #1F2937. 3. Add text element: type '500', set font to Montserrat ExtraBold, size 240pt, color #F59E0B — center horizontally at Y=30% from top. 4. Below '500', add text 'ChatGPT Prompts' in Montserrat Bold 72pt white, center-aligned. 5. Add 'FOR ENTREPRENEURS' in Montserrat SemiBold 28pt color #F59E0B, letter spacing +200, below title. 6. Add a horizontal line element: color #F59E0B, width 600px, 3px height — place between icon and title. 7. Add rounded rectangle badge top-right: #F59E0B fill, dark text 'INSTANT DOWNLOAD' 16pt. 8. Add a full-width rectangle at bottom: height 80px, fill #111827. Inside it, add 'AI Tools Hub' left-aligned 18pt #F59E0B. 9. Optionally add a large lightbulb emoji or rocket at top center above '500' at 120pt. Export as JPG 2000x2000 at 300 DPI.

coverSpec.title: No-Code AI Automation Playbook
coverSpec.subtitle: AUTOMATE YOUR WORK IN HOURS
coverSpec.tagline: Zapier, Make.com, n8n & AI — Zero Coding Required
coverSpec.icon: ⚙️ gear with connecting arrows icon, or a flow diagram shape — shows automation workflow
elements: Simple flow diagram: 3 boxes connected by arrows (Trigger → AI → Action) in violet/white at 20% opacity as background visual
Gear emoji ⚙️ or flow arrows icon in violet #A78BFA at 140pt top-center
Title 'No-Code AI Automation Playbook' in white Inter Bold 58pt, 2 lines
Subtitle 'AUTOMATE YOUR WORK IN HOURS' in #A78BFA 26pt Bold letter-spaced
Horizontal violet divider line 580px wide
Tool badges row: Zapier | Make.com | n8n | AI — rounded pills in #1E1B4B with #A78BFA text
Badge: 'NO CODING REQUIRED' in white on violet, top-right corner
Tagline in #C4B5FD 20pt italic
Bottom bar: #1E1B4B with 'AI Tools Hub' in #A78BFA 18pt
coverSpec.canvaInstructions: 1. Create 2000x2000px canvas, background #312E81 (deep indigo). 2. Create a subtle background workflow diagram: add 3 rounded rectangles (50% opacity, no fill just outline in #A78BFA) connected by right-pointing arrows — place at center-background. Labels in the boxes: 'Trigger', 'AI', 'Action'. Scale to fill ~80% canvas width. Set entire diagram to 15% opacity. 3. Place ⚙️ gear emoji at top-center 140pt, color tint #A78BFA. 4. Add 'No-Code AI' in Inter Bold 64pt white. 5. Add 'Automation Playbook' in Inter Bold 58pt white — slightly smaller to fit. 6. Add 'AUTOMATE YOUR WORK IN HOURS' in Inter Bold 26pt #A78BFA, letter-spacing +120. 7. Add horizontal line #A78BFA 580px wide, 3px. 8. Add 4 pill badges in a row: Zapier, Make.com, n8n, AI — background #1E1B4B, text #A78BFA, 14pt. 9. Top-right pill: #A78BFA background, white text 'NO CODING REQUIRED'. 10. Bottom bar 80px: #1E1B4B, 'AI Tools Hub' #A78BFA. Export JPG 300 DPI.

coverSpec.title: AI-Powered Morning Routine System

coverSpec.tagline: Plan, Prioritize & Execute Your Day with AI
coverSpec.icon: 🌅 sunrise emoji or sun rising over horizon — warm, energizing visual
elements: Sunrise emoji 🌅 or gradient sun arc graphic in orange-to-amber at top-center, 160pt
Warm orange horizontal gradient strip below icon (left: #F97316, right: #F59E0B) 2000px wide 8px

coverSpec.canvaInstructions: 1. Create 2000x2000px canvas, background #292524 (warm dark charcoal). 2. Place sunrise emoji 🌅 at top-center, 160pt. 3. Add a horizontal gradient strip: use a rectangle 2000px wide x 8px tall, with orange gradient left-to-right (#F97316 to #F59E0B) — position just below the emoji. 4. Add '45 MIN' in Poppins ExtraBold 80pt #F97316 — place prominently, vertically centered around 40% from top. 5. Below '45 MIN', add 'daily flow' in Poppins Light 28pt white. 6. Add 'AI-Powered Morning Routine System' in Poppins Bold 56pt white, 3 lines max, above '45 MIN' or restructure to: icon at top, title below, '45 MIN' large below title. 7. Add subtitle '45-MINUTE FLOW FOR PEAK PERFORMANCE' in Poppins Medium 22pt #FED7AA. 8. Add 3 icon-text pairs in a row: ☀️ Plan | 🎯 Focus | ✅ Win in white 16pt, horizontally spaced evenly. 9. Add 'INCLUDES AI PROMPTS' pill: #F97316 background, white text 14pt. 10. Bottom bar 80px: #1C1917, 'AI Tools Hub' in #F97316. Export JPG 300 DPI.

mockupSpecs.description: Product printout laid on a bright white surface next to an open leather journal, a pen, and a steaming coffee mug. Natural morning sunlight streaming from the left. Very warm, aspirational, peaceful morning vibe.
mockupSpecs.lighting: warm golden morning sunlight from far left, very soft shadows
mockupSpecs.angle: overhead flat lay 90 degrees, natural organic arrangement
mockupSpecs.canvaSearch: morning flatlay journal coffee notebook pen natural light mockup
mockupSpecs.placementNote: Let natural-looking warm light blow out slightly on the left edge — reinforces morning sunrise theme

mockupSpecs.description: iPhone on a bedside table showing the routine on screen. Small alarm clock, a glass of water, and sunglasses beside it. Warm early morning light from a window. Shows the product as part of a real morning routine.
mockupSpecs.lighting: warm, slightly orange early morning window light from the right
mockupSpecs.angle: slight overhead looking down from 45 degrees
mockupSpecs.canvaSearch: phone bedside morning routine setup warm light mockup lifestyle
mockupSpecs.placementNote: Alarm clock should show 6:00 AM to reinforce morning theme

mockupSpecs.description: iPad on a kitchen counter showing the morning routine. A bowl of oats, a small espresso cup, and fresh fruit beside it. Shows a healthy, productive morning ritual in a home kitchen environment.
props: iPad on stand or propped up
mockupSpecs.lighting: bright morning kitchen light, slightly cool-white with warm accents
mockupSpecs.angle: three-quarter front view, eye level of counter
mockupSpecs.canvaSearch: iPad kitchen counter morning healthy lifestyle mockup
mockupSpecs.placementNote: Product routine is visible on screen — showing Day 1 morning protocol or prompt list

coverSpec.title: Notion AI Productivity Bundle
coverSpec.subtitle: 5 READY-TO-USE TEMPLATES
coverSpec.tagline: Second Brain, Project Tracker, Daily Planner & More
coverSpec.icon: ◻️ Notion-style page/block icon — clean and minimal, no emojis
elements: Clean white square outline icon (Notion-style page with folded corner) at top-center — SVG preferred, 120px
Large '5' in white at 200pt — very clean, dominant
Text 'TEMPLATES' in white Inter Light 60pt immediately to the right of or below '5'
Thin horizontal white divider line, 500px wide, 1px (Notion's minimal aesthetic)
Title 'Notion AI Productivity Bundle' in white Inter Bold 56pt
Subtitle '5 READY-TO-USE TEMPLATES' in gray #A3A3A3 24pt
Five template name badges in a column or grid: Second Brain | Project Tracker | Daily Planner | Meeting Notes | Goal Setting
Minimal tagline in #737373 20pt
Bottom bar: #0A0A0A pure black with 'AI Tools Hub' in white 18pt
Entire design uses ONLY black, white, and grays — NO color accents — Notion-pure aesthetic
coverSpec.canvaInstructions: 1. Create 2000x2000px canvas, background #1A1A1A (near black). 2. Add a Notion-style page icon: find a simple document/page outline SVG in Canva Elements — color it white. Place top-center at about 100px tall. 3. Add '5' in Inter ExtraBold 200pt white — position at upper-center below icon. 4. Add 'TEMPLATES' in Inter Light 60pt white, either on the same baseline as '5' or directly below. 5. Add horizontal rule: white line 500px wide, 1px height (Notion uses very thin rules). 6. Add 'Notion AI Productivity Bundle' in Inter Bold 56pt white. 7. Add '5 READY-TO-USE TEMPLATES' in Inter Regular 24pt #A3A3A3 (gray). 8. Add 5 template names in a column of small pill badges: background #2A2A2A (very dark gray), text #FFFFFF 13pt — Second Brain, Project Tracker, Daily Planner, Meeting Notes, Goal Setting. 9. Tagline in #737373 20pt. 10. Bottom bar 80px: #0A0A0A, 'AI Tools Hub' in white. NO COLOR — only black, white, dark gray. Export JPG 300 DPI.

mockupSpecs.description: iPad Pro on a clean white desk showing a Notion-style template interface. Beside it, a minimal black pen and a white ceramic cup. Entire composition is monochromatic — white, black, light gray only. Matches Notion's clean aesthetic.
mockupSpecs.lighting: clean bright overhead natural light, no warmth — cool and clinical to match Notion's aesthetic
mockupSpecs.canvaSearch: iPad flatlay white minimal clean desk mockup digital product notion
mockupSpecs.placementNote: Everything in frame should be white, black, or gray — no color props whatsoever

mockupSpecs.description: MacBook on a white desk showing the Notion templates in action — a dark-mode Notion interface on screen. Small desk plant (black pot) and minimal notepad are the only props. Monochromatic, editorial feel.
mockupSpecs.lighting: even bright natural daylight, no shadows
mockupSpecs.canvaSearch: MacBook white desk minimal clean Notion dark mode mockup
mockupSpecs.placementNote: Notion dark mode interface visible on screen — shows Second Brain template layout if possible

mockupSpecs.description: Three printed template sheets in black-and-white on a white marble surface. Fanned slightly. A black fountain pen placed diagonally across the top sheet. Minimal, editorial, magazine-style shot.
mockupSpecs.lighting: harsh directional light from one side creating clean sharp shadows — editorial style
mockupSpecs.canvaSearch: printed sheets black white minimal editorial flatlay pen marble mockup
mockupSpecs.placementNote: Sheets should be printed with visible Notion-style block layouts — headers, checkboxes, databases

consistency: All covers 2000x2000px at 300 DPI — no exceptions
Shop name 'AI Tools Hub' must appear in the bottom-left corner of every cover
Every cover must have a horizontal accent bar or divider line separating title from subtitle
All text must pass WCAG AA contrast ratio — minimum 4.5:1 ratio between text and background
No more than 3 font families per cover — same font in different weights counts as one family
Every cover must include at least one visually dominant number or quantity (500, 30, 7, 5, etc.)
All primary covers use brand dark backgrounds — no white primary covers
Accent colors must come from the niche color system defined in brandIdentity.colorSystem.niches
Every cover includes a single clear primary icon or visual anchor centered in the upper 40% of the canvas
Bottom bar height fixed at 80px across all products for visual consistency

etsyImageRequirements.primaryImage: 2000x2000px JPG, square format, product cover — required first image slot
secondaryImages: Device mockup (iPad or MacBook with product on screen)
Lifestyle flatlay showing product in real use context
Close-up preview of 2-3 interior pages or template sections
recommendedImageOrder: Slot 2: Best device mockup (iPad or laptop flatlay)
Slot 4: Interior page preview — shows content quality
Slot 5 (optional): Before/after or use case infographic
etsyImageRequirements.format: JPG preferred (smaller file size), PNG accepted for transparency needs
etsyImageRequirements.aspectRatioNote: Etsy displays primary images as squares — crop all images to 1:1 ratio before uploading

coverDontDo: No clip art or low-resolution stock icons — use emoji or high-quality SVG only
No white or light backgrounds on primary cover — use brand dark colors from the niche palette
No more than 6 words in the main headline title line
Never use Comic Sans, Times New Roman, Papyrus, or Courier as a design font
No clashing gradient combinations — if using gradients, stay within the same color temperature
Do not use more than 3 different font weights in one design
No centered text blocks longer than 4 lines — readability suffers at small thumbnail sizes
No images or photography on the primary cover — icon/emoji/shape elements only
Never omit the shop name from the bottom bar
Do not use neon or fluorescent colors on dark backgrounds — use the approved niche accent colors only

thumbnailOptimization.note: Etsy search results show covers at approximately 170x135px — design must read clearly at this size
rules: Primary number or quantity (500, 30, etc.) must be readable at thumbnail size — minimum 240pt on 2000px canvas
Main title must be readable at 2 lines maximum on thumbnail — avoid 3+ line titles where possible
High contrast is critical — test your cover by scaling it down to 200px wide before exporting
Avoid fine details, thin lines under 2px, or small text under 16pt for anything that must be read at thumbnail

freeWorkflow: Step 1: Create cover in Canva (free), export as 2000x2000px JPG
Step 2: Find device mockup template in Canva (search 'iPad mockup flat lay') or Smartmockups free tier
Step 3: Drop your cover into the smart object / device screen
Step 4: Add props as described in each product mockupSpecs
Step 5: Export mockup at 2000x2000px, crop to square if needed
mockupSourceSites: Canva.com — Free device mockup templates (search 'iPad flatlay', 'MacBook mockup')
Smartmockups.com — Free tier with limited but quality device mockups
Mockupworld.co — Free PSD mockups downloadable (requires Photoshop or GIMP)
Ls.graphics — High quality free and paid device scene mockups
Pixeden.com — Free mockup resources for digital products
propsourceTips: For flatlay props: photograph your own desk items on a white or marble surface using phone camera
Unsplash.com — Free high-resolution lifestyle and desk photography for background use
Pexels.com — Free stock photos for workspace and desk setups
Use Canva's 'Mockup' feature (Creator plan) for automatic smart object replacement

recommendedFreeTools: Canva (canva.com) — Free tier sufficient for all covers and most mockups; search 'digital product cover'
Adobe Express (express.adobe.com) — Free tier with good templates and brand kit
GIMP (gimp.org) — Free open-source Photoshop alternative for PSD mockup editing
Inkscape (inkscape.org) — Free SVG editor for creating custom icons
Unsplash (unsplash.com) — Free high-quality photos for mockup backgrounds and lifestyle props
Pexels (pexels.com) — Free stock photography for desk and lifestyle mockup contexts
Remove.bg (remove.bg) — Free background removal for product transparency needs
Squoosh (squoosh.app) — Free image compression to meet Etsy file size requirements
qualityChecklist: Cover reads clearly when scaled to 200px wide (thumbnail test)
Shop name visible in bottom-left corner
Accent color matches the product's niche palette
Primary cover exported as JPG at 2000x2000px
At least 2 mockup images created per product
Interior page preview image created showing actual content
All images renamed using convention: {productId}-cover.jpg, {productId}-mockup-1.jpg, etc.
No personal information, watermarks, or third-party logos in final export
